title: Community UI is poor
excerpt:
New to Monday. 
1st suggestion, why is the community site so hard to use? 
Vast amounts of white space when I actually want to see posts quickly and efficiently. 
Any plans to update the UI and make our lives more produc…

posts.author: JKJK (JK)
posts.cookedHtml:
New to Monday.
1st suggestion, why is the community site so hard to use?
Vast amounts of white space when I actually want to see posts quickly and efficiently.
Any plans to update the UI and make our lives more productive?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JKJK!

We hear you, and want to let you know that very very soon we will be rolling out a new, revamped and redesigned community forum Please keep your eyes peeled!
